scripts.test:all: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:load: echo 'Load tests are run via pnpm test:performance (uses endpoints.json configuration)'
scripts.test:load:ai: echo 'AI tests are included in pnpm test:performance'
scripts.test:load:all: echo 'All load tests run via pnpm test:performance'
scripts.test:load:api: echo 'API tests are included in pnpm test:performance'
scripts.test:load:auth: echo 'Auth tests are included in pnpm test:performance'
scripts.test:load:auth-load: echo 'Auth load tests are included in pnpm test:performance'
scripts.test:load:cms: echo 'CMS tests are included in pnpm test:performance'
scripts.test:load:payment: echo 'Payment tests are included in pnpm test:performance'
scripts.test:memory:all: cd ../.. && pnpm exec tsx packages/test/scripts/run-memory-tests.ts all
scripts.test:memory:dual: cd ../.. && pnpm exec tsx packages/test/scripts/run-memory-tests.ts dual
scripts.test:memory:episodic: cd ../.. && pnpm exec tsx packages/test/scripts/run-memory-tests.ts episodic
scripts.test:memory:vector: cd ../.. && pnpm exec tsx packages/test/scripts/run-memory-tests.ts vector
scripts.test:perf:auth: k6 run load-tests/auth/auth-sign-in.js && k6 run load-tests/auth/auth-sign-up.js && k6 run load-tests/auth/auth-rate-limiting.js
scripts.test:perf:dry-run: cd ../.. && DRY_RUN=true pnpm exec tsx scripts/test/performance-baseline.ts
